name: paper-source
description: Paper Source finds, deduplicates against Paper Wiki backlogs and read-only Zotero inventory, ranks, parses, stages, and hands off paper evidence for Paper Wiki-compatible vaults.

interface.shortDescription: v2.9.0 | Paper Source: health doctor, MCP/runtime diagnostics, discover, graph visibility, CJK query planning, config diagnostics, progress telemetry, wiki/Zotero discovery dedupe, required concept groups, benchmark gates, Grok diagnostics, Zotero helper adapter, recall/risk checks, recommend, record.
interface.longDescription: Paper Source is the source/evidence and health-diagnostics layer for PaperFlow: diagnose Paper Source, Paper Wiki, MCP, runtime.json, provider env, OpenAI-compatible/Grok gateway, Cloudflare/non-JSON upstream, MinerU, EasyScholar, Zotero, and vault contract health; resolve and call the official Zotero helper through a thin audited adapter without copying or reimplementing the Zotero plugin; run read-only discovery-time Zotero dedupe after wiki _meta/reference-index.json checks, write zotero-dedupe-record.json, and separate already_in_zotero_not_wiki, possible_zotero_duplicate, new_candidate, zotero_unavailable, and not_checked candidates in session_recommendations without importing Zotero items or writing Paper Wiki sync state; initialize and repair Obsidian graph visibility with empty graph.json search plus app.json userIgnoreFilters instead of fragile formal-root graph search regexes; configure profile-driven discovery with machine-visible unknown_keys diagnostics for config init/update payloads, run discover-papers for natural-language paper search, run local fixture discovery-benchmark gates for precision/recall/review-leakage/duplicate/citation/config regressions, deduplicate against wiki _meta/reference-index.json before raw source bundles, record transparent query plans with hard/soft constraints, required concept groups, CJK topic terms, strict year parsing, term_provenance_detail, query-plan diagnostics, and agent/config/Research Brief acronym or synonym expansions, write runtime progress telemetry through progress-events.jsonl / progress-summary.json / report.json.discovery_context.discovery_progress so long discovery runs expose phase timings, heartbeats, last-known phase, and artifact paths without corrupting JSON stdout, expose plugin-installed grok-search-rs MCP self-registration backed by user-level runtime.json, optionally use configured grok-search-rs MCP as targeted or parallel high-quality supplemental recall without replacing paper-search MCP, diagnose Grok provider/runtime failures, timeout/budget cutoffs, shared timeout budgets, source fallback, page-chrome extraction, weak identity extraction, retry outcomes, and filter/rank non-contribution counts, enrich DOI/code metadata, recover provider-supplied official versions or related papers into recall-gap artifacts, apply provider quality-risk checks for retraction, withdrawal, expression-of-concern, paper-mill, and predatory-venue evidence, apply lexical relevance checks plus normalized citation ranking and config/agent-plan quality-evidence lexicons, apply cross-discipline quality gates with explicit identity/relevance/inspectability/validation/source-confidence/reproducibility/request-risk/quality-risk dimensions, treat paper-search-mcp as retrieval and metadata coverage rather than a semantic quality ranker, emit DOI-required non-Reject session_recommendations for chat-facing reading decisions with quality-risk cautions, zero-primary, required-concept-group, Zotero dedupe, and quality-reject diagnostics, auto-stage selected primary PDF-available recommendations, acquire PDFs or manual-download records, parse with MinerU, recover configured MinerU CDN ZIP downloads in fake-IP environments, preserve source bundles, produce Chinese approval reports, record explicit human or Codex automation approval metadata, hand off via wiki-ingest-brief.json and wiki-agent-trigger.json, and record final wiki ingest. Paper Wiki or another wiki-capable agent owns formal page writing and Zotero sync/apply writes.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose Paper Source / Paper Wiki setup health.
Use Paper Source / PS to find, dedupe, rank, diagnose, and stage high-quality papers.
Initialize or repair Paper Source vault graph visibility, then prepare selected papers for Paper Wiki handoff and record wiki ingest.
